'''鈭歝h-d-zh''' ('''kachadazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yirk|yirk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yirk|yirk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-d-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kachadazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichadazh|thichadazh]] || [[word:jichadazh|jichadazh]] || [[word:shichadazh|shichadazh]] || [[word:kichadazh|kichadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchadazh|thuthuchadazh]] || [[word:jujuchadazh|jujuchadazh]] || [[word:shushuchadazh|shushuchadazh]] || [[word:kukuchadazh|kukuchadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchadazh|thuchadazh]] || [[word:juchadazh|juchadazh]] || [[word:shuchadazh|shuchadazh]] || [[word:kuchadazh|kuchadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchadazh|thuchadazh]] || [[word:juchadazh|juchadazh]] || [[word:shuchadazh|shuchadazh]] || [[word:kuchadazh|kuchadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechadazh|thechadazh]] || [[word:jechadazh|jechadazh]] || [[word:shechadazh|shechadazh]] || [[word:kechadazh|kechadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochadazh|thothochadazh]] || [[word:jojochadazh|jojochadazh]] || [[word:shoshochadazh|shoshochadazh]] || [[word:kokochadazh|kokochadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochadazh|thochadazh]] || [[word:jochadazh|jochadazh]] || [[word:shochadazh|shochadazh]] || [[word:kochadazh|kochadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochadazh|thochadazh]] || [[word:jochadazh|jochadazh]] || [[word:shochadazh|shochadazh]] || [[word:kochadazh|kochadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chadazh|th忙chadazh]] || [[word:j忙chadazh|j忙chadazh]] || [[word:sh忙chadazh|sh忙chadazh]] || [[word:k忙chadazh|k忙chadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachadazh|thathachadazh]] || [[word:jajachadazh|jajachadazh]] || [[word:shashachadazh|shashachadazh]] || [[word:kakachadazh|kakachadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachadazh|thachadazh]] || [[word:jachadazh|jachadazh]] || [[word:shachadazh|shachadazh]] || [[word:kachadazh|kachadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachadazh|thachadazh]] || [[word:jachadazh|jachadazh]] || [[word:shachadazh|shachadazh]] || [[word:kachadazh|kachadazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachadazh|shachadazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachadazh|goshachadazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachadazh|gokishachadazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachadazhn眉|shachadazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkn眉|goshachadazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachadazhn眉|gokishachadazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachadazhsh毛|shachadazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachadazhnksh毛|goshachadazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachadazhsh毛|gokishachadazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachadazhro|shachadazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkro|goshachadazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachadazhro|gokishachadazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachadazhmu|shachadazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkmu|goshachadazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachadazhmu|gokishachadazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachadazhsher|shachadazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachadazhnksher|goshachadazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachadazhsher|gokishachadazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachadazhng|shachadazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkng|goshachadazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachadazhng|gokishachadazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachadazhya|shachadazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkya|goshachadazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachadazhya|gokishachadazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachadazhyam|shachadazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkyam|goshachadazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachadazhyam|gokishachadazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachadazhn眉sh毛|shachadazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkn眉sh毛|goshachadazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachadazhn眉sh毛|gokishachadazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachadazhn眉ro|shachadazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkn眉ro|goshachadazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachadazhn眉ro|gokishachadazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachadazhn眉mu|shachadazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkn眉mu|goshachadazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachadazhn眉mu|gokishachadazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachadazhsh毛n眉|shachadazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachadazhnksh毛n眉|goshachadazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachadazhsh毛n眉|gokishachadazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachadazhsh毛ro|shachadazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachadazhnksh毛ro|goshachadazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachadazhsh毛ro|gokishachadazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachadazhsh毛mu|shachadazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachadazhnksh毛mu|goshachadazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachadazhsh毛mu|gokishachadazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachadazhron眉|shachadazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkron眉|goshachadazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachadazhron眉|gokishachadazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachadazhrosh毛|shachadazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkrosh毛|goshachadazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachadazhrosh毛|gokishachadazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachadazhromu|shachadazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkromu|goshachadazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachadazhromu|gokishachadazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachadazhmun眉|shachadazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkmun眉|goshachadazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachadazhmun眉|gokishachadazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachadazhmush毛|shachadazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkmush毛|goshachadazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachadazhmush毛|gokishachadazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachadazhmuro|shachadazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachadazhnkmuro|goshachadazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachadazhmuro|gokishachadazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
